description: UVM verification environment wrapping the AXI4 wide interconnect. Each AXI4 UVC has five per-channel agents (AW, W, B for write; AR, R for read), each encapsulating a sequencer, driver and monitor. Agents are grouped into UVC encapsulation boxes. The interconnect is the central routing element.

testbench.description: Top-level UVM testbench for AXI4 interconnect verification.

axi4_interconnect.description: AXI4 Crossbar Interconnect — routes master transactions to slave ports

uvm_read_scoreboard.description: Read scoreboard — checks AR/R channel transactions across all ports

ports.name: analysis_export
ports.description: TLM analysis export for read transactions

uvm_write_scoreboard.description: Write scoreboard — checks AW/W/B channel transactions across all ports

ports.name: analysis_export
ports.description: TLM analysis export for write transactions

instances.description: AXI4 crossbar interconnect — routes master transactions to slave ports
Read sequence — generates AR/R channel stimulus
Write sequence — generates AW/W/B channel stimulus

connections.description: System clock to all instances
Active-low reset to all instances
